proposals.motive: Ensure the 'test' script executes actual tests to prevent untested deployments.
proposals.diff:
diff --git a/package.json b/package.json
index 3e979ea..03b77ce 100644
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@
   "scripts": {
     "start": "ts-node src/index.ts",
     "dev": "ts-node-dev --respawn --transpile-only src/index.ts",
-    "test": "echo \"Error: no test specified\" && exit 1"
+    "test": "ts-node src/tests/index.ts"
   },
   "keywords": [],
   "author": "AngelReml",

proposals.motive: Provide clear instructions for running unit tests to assist new developers.

 npx tsx test_b9.ts

+

+npm test
+
+# Ejecutar un test específico
+npx jest <nombre-del-test>
+```
